abilities.effect: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its Grass-type moves inflict 1.5 as much regular damage.
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens Grass moves to inflict 1.5 damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

abilities.effect: This Pokemon's Speed is doubled during strong sunlight. This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
